scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Embedding models, semantic or sparse search, reranking, vector or graph RAG, retrieval training, corpus indexing, RAG pipelines, vector database clients, and retrieval evaluation.
scenarios.role: Use FlagEmbedding/BGE for embedding, reranking, retrieval/RAG model selection, fine-tuning data and command preparation, and evaluation workflow planning.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `flag-embedding` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: evaluation, finetuning, inference, and model catalog and rag.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `flag-embedding` when the request names `flag-embedding`, centers on embedding, reranking, retrieval/RAG model selection, fine-tuning data and command preparation, and evaluation workflow planning, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in embedding retrieval rag workflows. Then route to evaluation, finetuning, inference, or model catalog and RAG when those focused workflows match.
